claim_boundary: Tier 7.4b is a local software diagnostic for the predeclared cost-aware policy/action gate. It can justify a compact promotion and regression gate, but it is not a promoted mechanism, not a baseline freeze, not public usefulness proof, and not hardware/native transfer.

criteria.name: no test-label threshold tuning
criteria.value: fixed baseline uses train-only threshold calibration; v2.3 uses a locked conservative action floor plus online delayed feedback only

criteria.name: v2.3 wins at least two task families
no freeze or hardware transfer authorized

value.next_gate: Tier 7.4c - Cost-Aware Policy/Action Promotion + Compact Regression Gate

decision.next_gate: Tier 7.4c - Cost-Aware Policy/Action Promotion + Compact Regression Gate

method_note: The diagnostic uses a conservative action-confidence floor because the measured failure after the NAB chain was false-positive/action cost pressure. A permissive point-utility-only action threshold over-acted during local runner shakeout; the final audited gate therefore requires high-confidence action before spending an alert/act decision.
